text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
My first three years with Mejiro Ryan end with
resounding success.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Now that she's become a superstar racer,
everything around her seems to be changing.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Ryan, I wish to speak with you today regarding
the future of the Mejiro family.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
I've concluded that, for future generations, we
should expand our reach to the dirt tour.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
These tracks currently have no prestige. But if we
Mejiro boldly declare our intention to enter the
dirt races, then popular opinion will change.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: I don't think that'll be the case.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
So you're opposed to it? Because it's unlike the
Mejiro family to run on dirt?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
No, it's not that. Dirt races are perfectly fine. I
just think we don't need to declare it or anything.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
If we just enter the races and have a good time,
people will see that and come see us run.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Just doing what's right without being all high and
mighty... That'll reach the people's hearts.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: And I... like doing things that way better.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Ryan, you...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: How should I put this? ...You are a true Mejiro.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Huh? What do you mean?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
While I loudly advocate for the prestige that
comes with being a member of the Mejiro family...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
You care little for the name at all—which may be
more "Mejiro" than anything.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: That's mean, McQueen! I do care about being a Mejiro, okay?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
But I don't understand how me just saying what I
feel is considered Mejiro-like.

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text:
Look, it's Mejiro Ryan! Wow, that physique and
how she carries herself...

text_block_list.name: Umamusume B
text_block_list.text:
No wonder she's the superstar of a famous family.
She's, like, the pride of the Mejiros.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Trainer... What's going on?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
As soon as the results of the Twinkle Series came
in, people started actin' all weird.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
No one ever considered me much of a Mejiro
before that.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
It was always McQueen this and McQueen that.
Something's different.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: While I do agree with her...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Well, I guess I'll start with some dumbbell presses.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
I have to focus on each and every rep. Here we
go...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Nothing's changed in how she handles things, but
there's a certain dignity to her words and actions.
It must be...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Hm? Something wrong?
choice_data_list: You really are a Mejiro, Ryan.
You really are a Mejiro, Ryan.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: N-not you too! What are you talking about?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
I'm nothing like the typical Mejiro! I'm no elegant
lady, and all I like to do is get sweaty workin' out!
choice_data_list:
You're a certified representative of the Mejiro
name.

You're a certified representative of the Mejiro
name.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Huh? I am?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: I represent the Mejiro family, huh...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Ryan's burly physique has broken the traditional
norms of the Mejiro family.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Moving forward, she's going to create her own
traditions. Her every action will become
exemplary of what it means to be a Mejiro.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Okay, Trainer, are you ready? Today you're going
to meet my grandmother.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
If I'm a representative of the Mejiros, then that
means you're one of us too.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
After all, you're the one who succeeded in
training me!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Let's make everyone proud, together with
McQueen and Dober.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: All right... Time to open the gate!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
"The right effort will be rewarded." Mejiro Ryan's
words will become a part of the Mejiro family
legacy.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And the famed family will continue to develop
further, right along with Ryan herself.
